title: Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: പടനായർകുളങ്ങര മഹാദേവക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva.
overview.description: Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: പടനായർകുളങ്ങര മഹാദേവക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva. It is situated on the banks of the Pallikkal River at Karunagappally town of Kollam District in the Indian state of Kerala state. The temple is one of the 108 Shiva temples in Kerala. The temple is located on National Highway-47 in Karunagappally town.

topPlaces.name: Kallelibhagom
topPlaces.description: Kallelibhagom is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: H&J Mall
topPlaces.description: The H&J Mall is a shopping mall in Karunagappally in Kollam Metropolitan Area, India. The mall is owned by the NRI business man from the Karunagappally, Mr.

topPlaces.name: Kannetty
topPlaces.description: Kannetty is a village situated on the outskirts of Karunagappally, Kollam district, Kerala, India. Kannetty is famous for the Vallam kalis conducted in the backwater of the same name.

topPlaces.name: Karunagappalli
topPlaces.description: Karunagappally is a municipality in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. It is 24 km north of Kollam and 60 km (37 mi) south of Alappuzha.

topPlaces.name: Alumpeedika
topPlaces.description: Alumpeedika is a small village/hamlet of Oachira in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. It comes under Clappana Panchayath and belongs to South Kerala division.

topPlaces.name: Kothukumukku railway bridge
topPlaces.description: Kothukumukku railway bridge is a disused bridge, formerly part of the defunct Karunagappaly - KMML Chavara railway line. The bridge, which has a single broad-gauge track, has now become a local tourist attraction.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkumthala
topPlaces.description: Vadakkumthala is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Ayanivelikulangara
topPlaces.description: Ayanivelikulangara is a village in Karunagapally municipality of Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (76 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Padanayarkulangara Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kallelibhagom, H&J Mall, Kannetty, Karunagappalli, Alumpeedika.
